overall.description: Spider-Man video game footage showing the character perched on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square-inspired urban intersection. The scene features modern glass architecture with prominent digital billboards, moderate vehicle traffic, and pedestrians on the streets below, rendered in high-fidelity game engine graphics with bright natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: skyscraper ledge overlooking major urban intersection

events.description: small flying drone passes by on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man sitting on building ledge, occasionally shifting weight and looking around at the city below

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving along the street below, moving away from camera

entered.detail: tall glass facade building with reflective windows, immediately adjacent to camera position
tall modern skyscraper with multiple digital billboards and purple signage
large prominent red digital billboard at the end of the street intersection
multi-lane urban street with crosswalks and moving traffic below
concrete building ledge where Spider-Man is perched, with metal railing

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man sits perched on a high-rise building ledge overlooking a vibrant urban intersection reminiscent of Times Square. The character remains mostly stationary, observing the moderate traffic flow and pedestrians below while surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers and bright digital billboards. A small drone briefly flies past on the right side, adding momentary motion to the otherwise static observation point.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, observant perspective from a high-altitude vantage point overlooking a vibrant, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins with Spider-Man perched motionless on a high-rise building ledge, gazing down at the rhythmic flow of moderate traffic and pedestrians below. As the camera lingers, the surrounding environment is defined by towering glass skyscrapers and the glow of massive digital billboards that bathe the scene in bright light. The stillness of the observation point is then briefly interrupted as a small drone zips past on the right side, adding a flicker of movement to the sprawling city vista.
